title: SimCity 2000
edition_pinned: SimCity 2000 Special Edition GOG listing, observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1993 SimCity 2000 design.
moat: Zoning demand and budget feedback turn tile placement into cascading infrastructure bottlenecks.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One zoning-and-services toolkit supports endless city layouts without authored mission gates.
exemplar_rationale: Shows classic city-builder depth from systemic feedback rather than scripted scenarios.

evidence.claim: GOG product page genres field listed: Simulation; Building; Managerial.
